title: Routing/SCHC payloads synthesized as APRS text
description: python/src/lichen/interface/kiss/bridge.py:377-382. spec/kiss-framing.md §3.2 (port 0 = APRS data). _is_l2_routing_payload() is defined but never called, so mesh routing announces (0x15 0x01) and SCHC packets (0x14...) received via _on_link_rx are formatted as APRS text and pushed to the TNC app as garbage messages. Pre-existing. Fix: use the helper (and classify_l2_payload) to filter non-application payloads before APRS synthesis.
